content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve Debugging
content.seo_description: Master the Antigravity project template to eliminate debugging bottlenecks. An advanced guide for freelancers using AI-driven workflows and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing bugs manually. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you standardize your architecture, enabling autonomous AI debugging. By integrating Claude Code, you transform your codebase into a self-healing ecosystem, allowing you to ship production-grade features in record time while maintaining absolute control over your project's technical debt.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal full of cryptic stack traces, the client’s deadline is looming, and your original architecture has become a tangled web of technical debt. This is the freelancer's purgatory: you aren't just coding; you're drowning in bugs that defy logical explanation. The clock is ticking, and every hour spent debugging is an hour of lost profit.

But what if your project template was built to fight back? Enter the Antigravity paradigm—a high-velocity scaffolding system designed specifically for AI-assisted development. By standardizing your structure and offloading the heavy lifting to Claude Code, you turn the debugging process from a manual grind into an automated, surgical operation.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish a standardized project structure that AI agents can navigate intuitively, reducing hallucinations during debugging sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity base template. Ensure the directory structure follows the modular 'Feature-First' architecture with strict separation between logic, state, and UI components.

steps.title: Inject Contextual Metadata
steps.description: Feed the AI the 'Why' behind your architecture so it understands the design patterns when debugging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the current project directory and generate an 'architecture.md' file that outlines the dependency tree and state management patterns for use by Claude Code.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use automated diagnostic tools to pinpoint the exact module causing the runtime crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the logs provided in the terminal. Identify the specific function causing the unhandled exception and propose a fix that adheres to the established project coding standards.

steps.title: Apply Hotfix with Verification
steps.description: Implement the fix and immediately run an automated test suite to ensure no regressions were introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the suggested fix for the identified bug. Include an automated unit test in the 'tests/' directory that covers this edge case permanently.

steps.title: Refactor for Future-Proofing
steps.description: Refine the code to prevent similar bugs, ensuring your project remains maintainable for future client requests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current module to be more defensive. Implement robust error handling that matches the Antigravity project's global logging strategy.

pro_tips: Always store your Claude Code conversation logs as Markdown files within the project root to create an 'AI-audit trail' for future debugging.
Use Antigravity's 'Strict Typing' mode to force the AI to write more predictable, bug-resistant code from the start.
Configure custom .claudeignore files to keep the AI focused only on core business logic, ignoring build artifacts and heavy assets.
When facing complex bugs, ask the AI to explain the failure in terms of 'state flow' rather than line-by-line syntax to uncover logic errors.
Run periodic 'Self-Audit' prompts using Claude Code every time you integrate a new third-party library to identify potential conflicts early.
content.next_steps: Once your first module is stabilized, implement a CI/CD pipeline that automatically triggers a Claude Code 'audit' command on every pull request to maintain zero-bug status.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on manual debugging and start scaling your freelance business with AI-powered efficiency. You have the tools, the template, and the strategy to outperform any competition. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
